ownership.usage: route-safe service lift and hoist call box dressing for steampunk transition areas

styleNorthStar.theme: Brassworks Breach compact steampunk service lift call box
styleNorthStar.summary: Wall-adjacent lift or hoist control dressing with blackened riveted iron backplate, aged brass pull lever and guard, cream enamel gauge, amber/red/green lamp language, copper or brass pressure pipes, stamped label plate, visible fasteners, and oil/scorch grime.
requiredVisualElements: aged brass pull lever and guard
amber red green service lamp language
copper or brass pressure feed pipes
visible rivets screws or mounting bolts
oil scorch grime or soot wear plates
routeSafetyLanguage: no new interaction or route authority
does not narrow navigation or doorway clearance

placementIntent.intake_service_lift_call_box: Beside the service lift or lift-facing wall after the pressure-gate route, with amber/green readiness language and mineral-stained lower pipes.
placementIntent.pipeworks_service_lift_call_box: Beside the Pipeworks lift to Boilerheart, outside the combat lane, with darker oil grime and denser pressure pipe tie-ins.
placementIntent.boilerheart_service_lift_call_box: Near the Boilerheart lift transition, with heat-scorched backplate edges and strong red/amber pressure-status language.
placementIntent.foundry_emergency_hoist_call_box: Beside the emergency hoist path on a foundry-safe wall or lift frame, with emergency red lamp language and heavier soot.
placementIntent.governor_master_hoist_call_box: Beside the master override hoist or final exit, with ceremonial brass trim, cleaner gauge face, and master-hoist label language.

exampleNamedParts: Blackened Iron Backplate Edge Rail Left

requiredChecks: Find root by exact object name.
Confirm metadata component, component name, placement role, and promotion version.
Confirm required child roots or required named parts.
Count renderer-bearing children for backplate, lever, gauge, lamps, pipes, label, rivets, and grime.
Confirm zero colliders, zero trigger colliders, and zero NavMeshObstacle components under the hierarchy.
Confirm material names or child names include required role keywords: iron, brass, enamel or gauge, lamp, pipe, rivet or bolt, grime or oil or scorch.
Confirm each expected scene placement exists in Level01 through Level05 if all five roles are selected.
Confirm no object in the call-box hierarchy has a gameplay interaction component unless a future slice explicitly owns that work.

notes: Docs-only sidecar handoff created for the selected v0.1.30 asset queue slice.
Implementation must remain route-safe and noninteractive.
Existing transition triggers remain the only gameplay authority.
Main lane implemented and validated five collider-free call box placements in v0.1.30.
v040 route audit and full V0 matrix passed on 2026-05-24 10:43 -04:00.
